recommendations.title: Drunken Master
recommendations.overview: After getting into trouble, a mischievous young man is sent to train under a brutal, but slovenly old beggar, who teaches him the secret of the Drunken Fist.

recommendations.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon: Sword of Destiny
recommendations.overview: A story of lost love, young love, a legendary sword and one last opportunity at redemption.

recommendations.title: True Legend

recommendations.title: Snake in the Eagle's Shadow
recommendations.overview: Everyone abuses and humiliates a downtrodden orphan until he befriends an old man, who turns out to be the last master of the snake fist fighting style. Jackie becomes the old man's student and finds himself in battle with the master of the eagle's c

recommendations.title: Iron Monkey
recommendations.overview: In this Hong Kong variation of Robin Hood, corrupt officials of a Chinese village are robbed by a masked bandit known as "Iron Monkey", named after a benevolent deity. When all else fails, the Governor forces a traveling physician into finding the ba

recommendations.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
recommendations.overview: Following his defeat by Master Ip, Cheung Tin Chi tries to make a life with his young son in Hong Kong, waiting tables at a bar that caters to expats. But it's not long before the mix of foreigners, money, and triad leaders draw him once again to the

recommendations.title: Dragonkeeper
recommendations.overview: Set in Han Imperial China, the plot follows the adventures of enslaved girl Ping with ancient dragon Long Danzi. Dragons had been banished from the kingdom. Ping, an orphan, finds one of the last remaining dragon eggs. Palace guards force Ping to run

recommendations.title: Crippled Avengers
recommendations.overview: A group of martial artists seek revenge after being crippled by Tu Tin-To, a martial arts master, and his son.

recommendations.title: Little Big Soldier
recommendations.overview: The story of a farmer forced into conscription, who has been looking to get out of the army ever since. His great chance arrives when he stumbles upon a wounded general from an enemy state, and he kidnaps him, intending to claim credit for the captur

recommendations.title: Lust, Caution
recommendations.overview: During World War II, a secret agent must seduce and assassinate an official who works for the Japanese puppet government in Shanghai.
